description_long: This is a straight, fixed wooden ladder with a natural finish, featuring evenly spaced rectangular rungs and two parallel side rails. The ladder is constructed from light-colored wood, with visible grain patterns and a sturdy, robust build. It has a simple, utilitarian design, lacking any visible safety features such as anti-slip feet or handrails, except for the extended side rails at the top and bottom which may provide minimal support. The rungs are flat and wide enough to accommodate a person's foot, and the overall structure appears suitable for permanent installation, such as accessing a loft or elevated platform. The ladder's side rails are rectangular in profile, contributing to its rigidity and strength. Its clean, minimalist appearance suggests it is intended for indoor or sheltered outdoor use in urban environments.
description: A straight, fixed wooden ladder with rectangular rungs and side rails, finished in natural wood. It has a simple, sturdy design with no visible safety features.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full height, all rungs, and the parallel side rails.
description_view_1: Angled top-down view highlighting the flat rungs and the rectangular profile of the side rails.
description_view_2: End-on view showing the narrow width and the alignment of the rungs between the side rails.
description_view_3: Angled bottom-up view emphasizing the underside of the rungs and the length of the ladder.
